title: Central University of Haryana Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
shortInfo: Central University of Haryana Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Central University of Haryana A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CUH Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria as per UGC Regulations 2018 (as amended from time to time) and AICTE/NCTE norms are eligible to apply for these Assistant Professor vacancies. The online application process for CUH Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 is currently ongoing and will remain open until 29 May 2026. Candidates can download the officia

basic_details.job_title: Central University of Haryana Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Haryana Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Central University of Haryana A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CUH Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria as per UGC Regulations 2018 (as amended from time to time) and AICTE/NCTE norms are eligible to apply for these Assistant Professor vacancies. The online application process for CUH Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 is currently ongoing and will remain open until 29 May 2026. Candidates can download the officia

qualification.education_qualification: UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers and other Academic Staff in Universities and Colleges and Measures for the Maintenance of Standards in Higher Education, 2018 (as amended from time to time), AICTE / NCTE norms (wherever applicable)
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Department of Political Science, School of Humanities and Social Science): UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers 2018 (as amended); AICTE/NCTE norms wherever applicable. Assistant Professor (Department of Geography - Geo Informatics, School of Basic Science): UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers 2018 (as amended); AICTE/NCTE norms wherever applicable.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor (Department of Political Science, School of Humanities and Social Science)
Assistant Professor (Department of Geography - Geo Informatics, School of Basic Science)

salary_details.details: Level-10 (as per 7th Pay Commission) Consolidated as per CUH norms

selection_process: Shortlisting / screening as per UGC 2018 Regulations (or AICTE/NCTE norms) Seminar / lecture / discussion on teaching/research aptitude / use of latest technology Recommendations of duly constituted Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Central University of Haryana to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Professor posts at Central University of Haryana?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Assistant Professor positions at Central University of Haryana is 29th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Assistant Professor posts at the Central University of Haryana. These positions are distributed across different departments as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required is as per UGC Regulations on Minimum Qualifications for Appointment of Teachers 2018 (as amended) and AICTE/NCTE norms wherever applicable. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1000/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be appointed at Level-10 as per the 7th Pay Commission. The salary will be consolidated as per Central University of Haryana norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Central University of Haryana Assistant Professor recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their applications.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed advertisement for any such information.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting based on UGC regulations, followed by a seminar/lecture/discussion on teaching/research aptitude, and finally, recommendations from a duly constituted Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Haryana apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Haryana, but it is advisable to check the official notification for specific eligibility criteria regarding domicile.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for easy access.
